runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 400m. Last start finished last on March 20 over 425m at Bendigo behind Destini Kadali beaten 17 lengths (25.42) in a Grade 5. Has run slick time here with a 22.67 PB at the distance. Go close.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at Ballarat (22.53) in a Rank Limit - Grade 5, finishing a 2.5 lengths second. Has two wins and six placings from 13 starts from the draw. Suited here and expected to run well.

runners.formComment: Returns from a 11 weeks break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed at big odds over 450m at Ballarat. Major threat on best form.

runners.formComment: Produced a good effort last start to finish fifth over 400m at this track, beaten 2 lengths (23.16) behind Comeback Charlie in a Grade 4/5 on April 7. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Shepparton over 390m in 22.70. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 400m at this track at Grade 5 H level. Can't recommend in this field.

runners.formComment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 23.02 despite jumping slowly. Can make it two on the bounce.
